meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: End Project Stagnation with AI Workflows
content.seo_description: Stop leaving projects unfinished. Learn a streamlined client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: To stop leaving projects unfinished, transition from manual coding to an AI-augmented client workflow. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you transform complex requirements into modular, shippable tasks. This methodology prioritizes rapid iteration, ensuring consistent delivery and high-quality results for every client engagement.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the initial spark of a new project is electric, but three weeks in, the momentum hits a wall. You are buried under technical debt, scope creep, and the crushing weight of unfinished features. Your client is waiting, your revenue is stagnant, and your reputation is on the line. It is not a lack of talent; it is a lack of a scalable, repeatable system.

Professional engineering isn't about writing every line of code—it is about orchestrating delivery. By adopting an AI-first workflow, you move from the 'grind' to the 'architect' role. This guide strips away the friction, showing you how to turn stalled projects into completed, high-value assets using modern AI tooling.

steps.title: Define the Minimum Viable Scope
steps.description: Stop building for perfection. Use Antigravity to distill your client's messy requirements into a precise, modular task list that guarantees a functional MVP.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following project requirements and output a prioritized task list for a 2-week MVP sprint. Focus on core functionality that provides immediate client value.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --prompt 'Review the Antigravity task list and create a project roadmap in project_plan.md'

steps.title: Architect the Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation. Use Antigravity to generate clean, scalable boilerplate that prevents future refactoring nightmares.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular folder structure and base configuration for a production-ready SaaS application using current industry standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --apply 'Create the file structure and base configuration based on the Antigravity schema'

steps.title: Automate Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on specific modules, ensuring that code is written to your exact style guide and documentation standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, testable function for [Feature Name] that handles edge cases and follows SOLID principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --prompt 'Implement [Feature Name] following the architecture defined in the project_plan.md'

steps.title: Continuous Integration Testing
steps.description: Never ship broken code. Automate your testing suite so that every push is verified against your client's requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests for the recently implemented modules, covering both success paths and error states.

steps.title: Client-Ready Documentation
steps.description: Close the loop by generating professional documentation automatically, ensuring your client feels confident in the handoff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a README and technical documentation summary for the client, explaining how to run and maintain the application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --prompt 'Generate a professional README.md summarizing all completed features and deployment instructions'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Decision Log' in your root directory; it prevents scope creep by recording why specific architectural choices were made.
Use Claude Code's `--chat` mode to perform code reviews on your own pull requests before submitting them to the client.
Pre-warm your AI context by feeding it your existing style guide or a successful previous project's codebase.
Break every task into sub-tasks that take no more than 90 minutes to complete; this psychological win keeps momentum high.
Before starting a new feature, ask the AI to identify potential 'gotchas' or performance bottlenecks in the current architecture.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current stalled project using the Antigravity prompt in Step 1. Once you see the roadmap, execute the first task using Claude Code to regain your momentum.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished projects drain your energy and bank account. Master the workflow that separates hobbyists from high-earning freelancers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
